opening_utterance: Aunque mucha gente piensa que el arte y la política tienen que estar separados, yo no estoy de acuerdo — el arte siempre dice algo.
notes: C1 articulating a position on art and protest. Mostly accurate but avoids low-frequency subjunctive triggers (concessive 'aunque' with hypothetical, adjective clauses with negation) and occasionally drops into casual register inside an academic-leaning argument. Tests subtle recasting at near-native level.
